apifyToken.title: Apify API Token
apifyToken.description: Your Apify personal API token (from console.apify.com → Settings → Integrations)

groqApiKey.title: Groq API Key
groqApiKey.description: Your free Groq API key (from console.groq.com → API Keys)

gmailSender.title: Gmail Sender Address
gmailSender.description: The Gmail address you send FROM

gmailPassword.title: Gmail App Password
gmailPassword.description: Gmail App Password (NOT your real password). Generate at myaccount.google.com → Security → App passwords

recipientEmail.title: Your Email (where to receive the report)
recipientEmail.description: Email address to deliver the daily report to
